page_metadata.biotools__summary: Machado is a Django instance that provides data management, visualization, and searching functionalities to Chado databases. The resulting object-relational framework enables users, not only to set up a local instance containing data regarding their organisms of interest, but also to support the develop of new tools as a back end.
